# Xposed Dalvik framework (rovo89 v58 / XposedBridge jar v54)
# Y1 and Y2 use assets/arm/app_process_xposed_sdk16 from XposedInstaller 4cd1038.
# Regenerate installer: solar-rom/scripts/build-xposed-installer-apk.sh
# Regenerate from device: solar-rom/scripts/extract-xposed-vendor.sh --api 17|19
# Optional native rebuild: solar-rom/scripts/build-xposed-native.sh arm:17|arm:19

installer-build/
